news.title: "We are seeing a certain degree of effectiveness from the use of generative AI" - Capcom clarifies its stance on using the controversial tech
news.titleEN: "We are seeing a certain degree of effectiveness from the use of generative AI" - Capcom clarifies its stance on using the controversial tech
news.desc: Capcom has said why it is using generative AI in its business, stating its policy is "to improve the efficiency of routine operations so that our developers can devote more time to essential value creation". Read more

news.title: PlayStation 5 hardware sales dropped dramatically in the UK last month vs Xbox
news.titleEN: PlayStation 5 hardware sales dropped dramatically in the UK last month vs Xbox
news.desc: Current-generation Xbox hardware sales have been low in all major markets, registering its worst-ever year in the UK last year. Fortunes almost turned in May, however, a month when PlayStation suffered a big drop in its own sales. Read more
